situation: audit-2026-07-03-012 finding SCRIPTS-L04 (priority 6, last pending): distill-patterns.py L42 uses bare `except Exception:` in load_json_robust helper. This catches IOError/PermissionError as intended but also silently swallows KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and MemoryError — masking user interrupt signals and OOM conditions during distillation runs that iterate hundreds of case files.
action: Narrow except clause to `(OSError, ValueError, TypeError, UnicodeDecodeError)`. OSError covers FileNotFoundError/PermissionError/IOError (file IO failures); ValueError+TypeError+UnicodeDecodeError cover json.load parse failures. Explicitly lets KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit/MemoryError propagate so distillation can be interrupted and OOM is not hidden. Updated docstring to document the narrowing rationale and reference SCRIPTS-L04.
outcome_evidence: Commit 5e22f30 on auto/opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 pushed to origin. Worktree copy verified: L42 now reads `except (OSError, ValueError, TypeError, UnicodeDecodeError):` with explanatory comment. New direction-shift worktree created because cp-guard blocked reuse of opt-scripts-shift-1783076032 (unmerged M01+L01 commits caused HEAD divergence). Main unchanged; fix awaits human merge review.
next_suggestion: 人工 review 积压 worktree：opt-scripts-shift-1783076032 (M01+L01)、opt-scripts-shift-1783076394 (M02)、opt-scripts-shift-1783078267 (L02)、opt-autonomous-studio-shift-1783079845 (L03)、opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 (L04)

audit_findings.finding: Bare `except Exception:` in load_json_robust masks KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit/MemoryError alongside intended IOError/parse errors. User cannot interrupt long distillation runs; OOM silently returns default.
audit_findings.remediation: Narrow to (OSError, ValueError, TypeError, UnicodeDecodeError). Covers file IO + JSON parse failures while letting KBI/SystemExit/OOM propagate.
